statement: In every magma, Equation 240 (`x = (y * (z * x)) * z`) implies Equation 1350 (`x = y * (((z * x) * x) * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0303
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y (op z x)) z)) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op (op (op z x) x) y))
